# Ubaldo Santos Patón

> Full-stack engineer with 6+ years of experience. @WIRIS. Building Nubric with the Assessment team. Previously on the MathType Integrations team.

Full-Stack Software Engineer with 6+ years of product experience. Specialized in TypeScript/JavaScript and PHP/Laravel, focused on maintainable architecture (hexagonal, DDD, SOLID), code quality and performance. At Wiris I'm building Nubric with the Assessment team; previously on the MathType Integrations team, I integrated MathType across Google Workspace, Office add-ins, Moodle, CKEditor, TinyMCE, Froala, Oxygen Web Author and more editors. At Rotrafu I scaled the main application to 50,000+ active services, cut load times by 35% and led ROTRAFU 2.0.

## Identity

- Name: Ubaldo Santos Patón
- Role: Full-Stack Software Engineer · TypeScript · PHP · Laravel · Vue
- Location: Badalona, Barcelona · Spain
- Experience: 6+ years (since 2020-06)
- Current: Wiris — Software Engineer · Assessment (Apr 2025 — Present)
- Email: u.santospaton@gmail.com
- Phone: +34 654 455 339
- Web: https://ubaldo.is-a.dev
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/ubaldo-santos
- GitHub: https://github.com/usantos-at-wiris

## Experience

- **Wiris — Software Engineer · Assessment (Apr 2025 — Present)**
  Product team focused on math assessment. I build Nubric (formerly Learning Lemur), a PHP/Laravel platform to create, auto-grade and programmatically rule exercises with embedded MathType, used by educational institutions.
  Tech: PHP, Laravel, MathType, Docker, Git
- **Wiris — Software Engineer · MathType Integrations (Mar 2024 — Apr 2025)**
  Built MathType integrations across the edtech ecosystem: Google Workspace, Office add-ins, Moodle, CKEditor, TinyMCE, Froala, Oxygen Web Author and other WYSIWYG editors. Includes the cross-platform SDK and each product connector, with modular TypeScript/Deno architecture.
  Tech: TypeScript, JavaScript, Deno, Vue.js, CKEditor, TinyMCE, Froala, Moodle, Oxygen Web Author, Google Workspace, Office Add-ins, Docker, Git
- **Rotrafu — Full-Stack Developer · IT Lead (Jun 2020 — Mar 2024)**
  IT lead and full-stack engineer designing, building and maintaining web applications for end-to-end funeral paperwork management. Led the company's digital transformation with custom PHP/Laravel solutions, in parallel with consulting at Prime IT (Jun–Dec 2023).
  Tech: PHP, Laravel, MySQL, JavaScript, REST APIs, Git, Docker, Agile
- **Prime IT — Senior Full-Stack Developer · PHP Consulting (Jun 2023 — Dec 2023)**
  Senior PHP consultant on staff, delivering solutions for clients across sectors while maintaining my role at Rotrafu. Applied scalable architectures, SOLID and agile methods in cross-functional teams.
  Tech: PHP, Laravel, REST APIs, MySQL, Git, Docker, Scrum

## Projects

- **Nubric (Learning Lemur)** — https://www.wiris.com/en/nubric/: Math assessment platform in Laravel: create, auto-grade and programmatically rule exercises with embedded MathType, used by educational institutions.
- **MathType Integrations** — https://www.wiris.com/en/solutions/integrations/: MathType integrations across Google Workspace, Office add-ins, Moodle, CKEditor, TinyMCE, Froala, Oxygen Web Author and more editors. Cross-platform SDK with hexagonal TypeScript/Deno architecture and up to 30% load-time reduction on optimized integrations.
- **MathType Add-in for Microsoft Office** — https://www.wiris.com/en/mathtype/office-tools/: Add-in for Word and PowerPoint using Office APIs and the MathType SDK, built with Vue.js as part of the Wiris integrations ecosystem.
- **ROTRAFU 2.0** — https://www.rotrafu.net/: Complete rebuild of the funeral-management app in Laravel: UX, scalability and security. 50,000+ active services and −35% load time.

## Core stack

- Primary: PHP, Laravel · TypeScript, Vue
- Languages: TypeScript, JavaScript, PHP, C#
- Backend: Laravel, Deno, Node, REST, OpenAPI, AI
- Frontend: Vue, HTML5, CSS3, Tailwind CSS
- Edtech: MathType, Google Workspace, Office Add-ins, Moodle, CKEditor, TinyMCE, Froala, Oxygen Web Author
- Practices: Arquitectura Hexagonal, DDD, SOLID, Design Patterns, TDD
- DevOps: Docker, Git, GitHub Actions, CI/CD, Unit Testing, Integration Testing
- Ribbon: TypeScript, PHP, Laravel, Vue, Deno, Node, AI, Docker, Git, MathType, Moodle, Tailwind, Hexagonal, TDD, CI/CD, OpenAPI, Electron

- Languages: Spanish (Native), Catalan (Native), English (Advanced (B2))
